prestazioni: Engine: EJ257 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals) with a Tomei 2.2L stroker kit (83mm crank, 99.5mm pistons, and 102mm connecting rods) for 2.5L to 2.6L displacement, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor, 71mm turbine) on a custom 3-inch divorced wastegate manifold (Perrin Performance) for 450-500whp on E85 with a 20psi peak boost target.

Drivetrain: PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.18, 3rd: 1.63, 4th: 1.29, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.84) with a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way LSD (200Nm torque capacity) and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch (ceramic puck, 800Nm rating) for launch control and aggressive shifts.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment) with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear, adjustable 3-position stiffness), Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms (0-3 degrees of toe adjustment), and a Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow steel) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height, 3D carbon fiber construction) and a custom front splitter (30mm overhang, 5mm aluminum undertray) for -150kg of downforce at 160km/h.

Exterior: RAUH-Welt Begriff (RWB) Monaco-style overfenders (hand-beaten aluminum, 50mm wider than stock) with a custom matte WR Blue Pearl wrap (3M 2080-120) and blacked-out STI badges (vinyl overlays, no drilling).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved, carbon fiber shell) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a Defi BF Advance multi-gauge cluster (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod.
